item.title: 👎💵John Burbank - Nelson Legacy Group LLC
item.description: John Burbank signed up to testify Con. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.description: Rian Watt signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent Economic Opportunity Institute. They are a registered lobbyist.
